rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals and has no bearing on Educ. Code §12.108, which governs open-enrollment charter school tuition and fees. The two provisions operate in unrelated policy domains.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school may not charge tuition to an eligible student who applies under Section 12.117.
_note: No conflict identified; rule_text pertains to charter school tuition and fees, not property tax homestead exemptions.
